The **men's 1 metre springboard** competition of the [diving events](/wiki/Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 16 (preliminary round) and 18 (final).

## Results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_1_metre_springboard&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Results")]
